failedAssertions.reason: The observed lifecycle still skips required active states: one launch went draft -> persona_review -> failed and another went draft -> failed, with no ready/queued/running states visible.
The real study Personas tab still shows 0 accepted variants; after triggering generation on a runBudget=50 study it reported 100 rejected variants and 150 retries, so no accepted rows rendered.
Draft studies still visibly expose Launch Study and the launch confirmation dialog, and confirming launch starts orchestration instead of rejecting the draft state.
A syntactically valid heartbeat callback with a garbage bearer token still returned HTTP 500 {"error":"misconfigured_callback_secret"} instead of HTTP 401.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No study reached running status and no runs were created, so real-time execution updates could not be observed on overview or runs surfaces.
No study reached a running state with queued/running runs, so cancellation propagation across overview/runs/findings could not be validated.
A real successful /execute-run round-trip still cannot be exercised because the callback receiver is misconfigured and the browser launch flow never produces a valid running study context.
The Environment label control still only exposes non-empty staging/qa/production options, so the required-field rejection path is not reachable through visible controls.
The study creation and detail surfaces do not expose the persisted createdBy identity, so this backend field cannot be validated through the real user surface.
The study wizard only lists published persona packs; there is no visible path to create a study against an unpublished pack from the user surface.
The visible launch dialog still only provides Confirm Launch and Cancel, so there is no exposed no-ack production submission path to exercise through the browser.
The queued path still could not be reached because manual Generate variants on a runBudget=50 study produced 0 accepted variants (100 rejected, 150 retries).
No successful launch reached queued, running, replaying, or analyzing; the real surface stayed at persona_review/failed with 0 runs created.
The full state-transition matrix is not exposed on the current user surface; the rerun only surfaced draft -> persona_review -> failed and draft -> failed outcomes.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded rerun findings that fresh orgs may need an imported/published pack before study creation, runBudget=0 and activeConcurrency=0 are blocked by native form validation, and runBudget=50 variant generation still yields 0 accepted variants.
